name: progress
description: Linear and circular progress bar with determinate and indeterminate modes, animated fill, and optional label.

props.name: variant
props.description: Shape variant of the progress indicator

props.name: showValue
props.description: Whether to display the numeric percentage value

props.name: label
props.description: Text label displayed above the linear progress bar

props.name: height
props.description: Height of the linear progress track in pixels; defaults to theme size token

props.name: size
props.description: Diameter of the circular progress indicator in pixels

props.name: indeterminate
props.description: When true, shows an animated indeterminate sweep instead of a fixed fill

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the outer container
